title: Billing Dispute with Escalation
description: Caller is upset about unexpected charges. Gets increasingly frustrated and asks for a human agent.

turns.caller: I just saw a charge on my credit card for $58 from TechFlow. My plan is supposed to be $29. What is going on?
I didn't add anyone to my team! Nobody new joined this month. This has to be an error.
Look, I've been a customer for two years. This is the second time I've had billing issues. I'm getting really frustrated.
No, I don't want to check the invoice page. I want to speak with a real person who can actually fix this.
